name: Potential Botnet Events Become Offenses
notes: This rule triggers when events are categorized as Botnet. Enable this rule if you wish all events categorized as Botnet Detected to create an offense.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Potential Exploit.Potential Botnet Connection
when the event matches Firewall action - BB - EN (custom) contains any of drop
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
TD_list: APPLY Potential Botnet Events Become Offenses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Potential Exploit.Potential Botnet Connection
AND NOT when the event matches Firewall action - BB - EN (custom) contains any of drop
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
